heading: Application of this subchapter to certain contracts
label: 3148 Application of this subchapter to certain contracts
text: This subchapter applies to a contract authorized by law that is made without regard to section 6101(b) to (d) of title 41, or on a cost-plus-a-fixed-fee basis or otherwise without advertising for proposals, if this subchapter otherwise would apply to the contract.
